name: ponytail
install_doc: README: Claude Code `/plugin marketplace add DietrichGebert/ponytail` + `/plugin install ponytail@ponytail` (interactive). THOL replicates that non-interactively: it clones the plugin into the sandbox config and wires the same SessionStart/SubagentStart/UserPromptSubmit hooks + skills the plugin ships (hooks/claude-codex-hooks.json).
notes: A Claude Code plugin + lifecycle hooks that inject a 'lazy senior dev' persona every turn so the agent writes LESS code (over-building is the waste it targets). Not an MCP server, not an output compressor — it acts on the INPUT/behaviour side. Whether 'write less' keeps task success is what this benchmark measures.
